gold_change_reason: Operator C introduces overlapping reaction IDs, requiring modification of add_all_exchange_reactions to return 'c1_db_rxn' alongside exchange reaction; A operators (empty compartments/boundaries) are already handled by seed code; overall code must include the modified helper function to satisfy scaled oracle cases.
covered_requirements: Introduce overlapping reaction IDs across different reaction types to test correct penalty precedence.
Ensure the function handles models with no compartments gracefully.
Ensure the function handles models with no compartment boundaries gracefully.
implementation_notes: Added overlapping reaction ID 'c1_db_rxn' to add_all_exchange_reactions to test penalty precedence; seed code already handles empty compartments and boundaries gracefully.
assumptions: The helper functions add_all_database_reactions, add_all_exchange_reactions, add_all_transport_reactions are defined as in the code; the code assumes they are defined before create_extended_model.
The model parameter has attributes extracellular_compartment, compartments, compartment_boundaries, and create_metabolic_model method.
